text: 🇺🇸 Iranian Embassy in Thailand wins the shit posting game. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 泰国伊朗大使馆赢得了“屎贴”比赛。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah fired four rockets at the Karmiel area in northern Israel. Two were intercepted. Two hit open areas. No injuries reported. Several Hezbollah drones launched at the Galilee earlier were also intercepted. The IDF says it lost contact with some drones, indicating they crashed. No impacts in populated areas. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：真主党向以色列北部的卡米尔地区发射了四枚火箭弹。两枚被拦截，两枚击中开阔地带。目前没有人员伤亡报告。早些时候向加利利发射的几架真主党无人机也被拦截。以色列国防军表示与部分无人机失去了联系，表明它们已经坠毁。人口稠密地区没有受到影响。推文

text: WarTranslated In Budapest, locals tore down Orban’s anti-Ukrainian posters and celebrated Magyar’s election victory in various ways. People sang "We Are the Champions," while a Hungarian soldier shouted from the stage to the crowd that the government's attitude toward Ukraine had been absurd and had only weakened Hungary's position. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：在布达佩斯，当地人拆除了欧尔班的反乌克兰海报，并以各种方式庆祝马扎尔的选举胜利。人们高唱《我们是冠军》，而一名匈牙利士兵在台上向人群高喊，政府对乌克兰的态度是荒谬的，只会削弱匈牙利的地位。推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Starmer says "The UK's best interests are in a stronger, closer relationship with Europe," as ministers look at introducing a bill to align the UK closer to EU single market rules, the bill also contains powers to introduce further changes later, without a vote — Sky https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043633952787759305/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv：最新消息——斯塔默表示“英国的最佳利益在于与欧洲建立更强大、更紧密的关系”，部长们正在考虑引入一项法案，使英国更接近欧盟单一市场规则。该法案还包含在未来无需投票即可引入进一步变更的权力——天空新闻 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043633952787759305/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pope Leo XIV: "I have no fear of the Trump administration or speaking out loudly of the message of the Gospel, which is what I believe I am here to do, what the Church is here to do. We are not politicians. We don't deal with foreign policy with the same perspective he might understand it, but I do believe in the message of the Gospel, as a peacemaker." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：教皇利奥十四世：“我不惧怕特朗普政府，也不惧怕大声说出福音的信息，这就是我认为我在这里要做的事情，也是教会在这里要做的事情。我们不是政客。我们处理外交政策的视角可能与他理解的不同，但我确实相信福音的信息，作为一名和平缔造者。”推文

text: OSINTdefender According to Israel’s N12 News, during trilateral negotiations between the U.S., Pakistan, and Iran, the U.S. proposed a partial release of frozen Iranian funds and the end to the conflict in exchange for a 20-year freeze on Iranian enrichment, the removal of all enriched material from Iran, and toll-free navigation through the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据以色列N12新闻报道，在美国、巴基斯坦和伊朗的三方谈判中，美国提议部分解冻伊朗资金并结束冲突，以换取伊朗冻结浓缩活动20年、从伊朗移除所有浓缩材料，以及通过霍尔木兹海峡的免通行费航行。推文

text: Amnesty Demands Probe on Nigeria Market Bombing Misfire that Killed Over 100 People Nigerian Air Force jets struck a crowded weekly market in Yobe state on Saturday, killing over 100 civilians including children. Amnesty International & local community leaders demanded an independent probe as the military cited successful operations against insurgencies. READ MORE
text_zh: 大赦国际要求对尼日利亚市场爆炸误炸事件进行调查，该事件造成100多人死亡。尼日利亚空军喷气式飞机周六袭击了约贝州一个拥挤的每周集市，造成包括儿童在内的100多名平民死亡。大赦国际和当地社区领袖要求进行独立调查，而军方则称这是针对叛乱活动的成功行动。阅读更多

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 We respect the choice of the Hungarian people - Peskov "We expect to continue our very pragmatic contacts with the new leadership of Hungary. We have heard statements, especially about the readiness to engage in dialogue," - said the presidential press secretary. Peskov noted that it is necessary to observe the actions of the new leadership of Hungary. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 我们尊重匈牙利人民的选择 - 佩斯科夫 “我们期待继续与匈牙利新领导层进行非常务实的接触。我们已经听到了声明，特别是关于准备进行对话的声明，”总统新闻秘书说。佩斯科夫指出，有必要观察匈牙利新领导层的行动。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Michael A. Horowitz Two Iranian-linked tankers exit the Gulf via Strait of Hormuz, ahead of US-announced blockade, Reuters reports citing shipping data. tweet

text: Open Source Intel German Chancellor Merz on the collapsed U.S.-Iran talks: "From the very beginning, I didn't get the impression that they were really well prepared. I was not surprised by the decision to break off the talks." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043629925412843754/photo/1 tweet

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇩🇪 🇭🇺 Friedrich Merz: 📌 “I am personally very grateful for this clear election result in Hungary. It shows that our democratic societies are more resilient than many think. Our democracies can withstand Russian propaganda and foreign interference.” 📌 “Right-wing populism has suffered a heavy defeat in Hungary. A clear signal has come from Hungary against right-wing populism worldwide.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231：🇩🇪 🇭🇺 弗里德里希·默茨：📌 “我个人非常感谢匈牙利这次明确的选举结果。它表明我们的民主社会比许多人想象的更具韧性。我们的民主制度能够抵御俄罗斯的宣传和外国干涉。” 📌 “右翼民粹主义在匈牙利遭受了惨败。匈牙利发出了反对全球右翼民粹主义的明确信号。” 与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Kremlin: The Kremlin does not believe Hungary’s elections will affect the situation around the Russia–Ukraine conflict.

text: Pope Leo XIV: I have no fear of the Trump administration or speaking out loudly of the message of the Gospel, which is what I believe I am here to do, what the Church is here to do. We are not politicians. We don’t deal with foreign policy with the same perspective he might understand it, but I do believe in the message of the Gospel, as a peacemaker. Source: OSV News
text_zh: 教皇利奥十四世：我不惧怕特朗普政府，也不惧怕大声说出福音的信息，这就是我认为我在这里要做的事情，也是教会在这里要做的事情。我们不是政客。我们处理外交政策的视角可能与他理解的不同，但我确实相信福音的信息，作为一名和平缔造者。来源：OSV News

text: German Chancellor Merz: We will continue to feel the consequences of the war in Iran for a long time, even after it is over. We are preparing ourselves for a prolonged period of significant strain on the German economy, and therefore also on private households.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨：即使在伊朗战争结束后，我们仍将在很长一段时间内感受到其后果。我们正在为德国经济，进而为私人家庭面临的长期重大压力做好准备。

text: German Chancellor Merz: I was not surprised by the decision to break off the talks in Islamabad. From the beginning, I did not have the impression that they were really well prepared.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨：我对伊斯兰堡会谈破裂的决定并不感到惊讶。从一开始，我就没有觉得他们准备得非常充分。

text: German Chancellor Merz: The war in Iran is the actual cause of the problems that we are also facing in our own country.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨：伊朗战争是我们国家面临问题的真正原因。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区红色警报响起。@wfwitness

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: Israel is not a structure that produces power on its own. There is a mindset here that has managed to hack the American political system through Zionism. What the United States does in this region does not serve its own interests, but benefits Israel. So why does the United States do this? It is not a rational model of behavior. It happens when you influence (American) politics.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：以色列不是一个能独立产生权力的结构。这里有一种心态，通过犹太复国主义成功地黑进了美国政治体系。美国在这个地区所做的事情并不符合其自身利益，而是使以色列受益。那么美国为什么要这样做呢？这不是一种理性的行为模式。当你在影响（美国）政治时，这种情况就会发生。

text: Trump reposts: Trump brilliantly calls Iran’s bluff — with his own Strait of Hormuz blockade.
text_zh: 特朗普转发：特朗普出色地叫板了伊朗——用他自己的霍尔木兹海峡封锁。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active near Acre, Kiryat Motzkin, and other surrounding areas in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Krayot • Lower Galilee • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部2个地区无人机警报活跃：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部阿卡、基里亚特莫茨金及周边地区无人机警报活跃：• 对抗线 • Krayot • 下加利利 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: 🇹🇷 💬 🇬🇷 🇮🇱 Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan on Greece-Israel relations: We see that Greece is pursuing highly risky policies here. There are very interesting aspects in Greece attempting to follow a type of policy that no other country in Europe is pursuing on its own. Neither Greece nor Southern Cyprus needs military cooperation with Israel. Greece is already a member of NATO, and Southern Cyprus has the backing of the EU. What strategic logic could justify seeking this kind of cooperation is something they cannot explain to me either. This is most likely an imposition on the government made under external pressure. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇹🇷 💬 🇬🇷 🇮🇱 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹谈希腊-以色列关系：我们看到希腊在这里奉行极其危险的政策。希腊试图奉行一种欧洲其他国家都没有单独奉行的政策，这方面有非常有趣的方面。希腊和南塞浦路斯都不需要与以色列进行军事合作。希腊已经是北约成员国，南塞浦路斯有欧盟的支持。寻求这种合作有什么战略逻辑，他们也无法向我解释。这很可能是外部压力下强加给政府的。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: After Iran, Israel cannot live without an enemy. We see that they are in search of developing a new rhetoric and declaring Turkey as the new enemy. We observe this not only in Netanyahu, but also among some figures in the Israeli opposition.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：在伊朗之后，以色列没有敌人就无法生存。我们看到他们正在寻求发展一种新的言论，并将土耳其宣布为新的敌人。我们不仅在内塔尼亚胡身上观察到这一点，在一些以色列反对派人物中也观察到了这一点。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s deputy interior minister Ali Akbar Pourjamshidian said U.S. President Trump’s threat to “destroy our civilisation” is more a joke born of ignorance than a serious analysis. He stated that those who do not understand Iran’s civilisation cannot grasp its depth, even if infrastructure is targeted. He added that when Iranians’ national pride is wounded, they rally in the streets to defend their country, and that even those with grievances against the system show fierce defence when faced with an external threat. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗内政部副部长阿里·阿克巴尔·普尔贾姆希迪安表示，美国总统特朗普威胁要“摧毁我们的文明”更多是出于无知的笑话，而非严肃的分析。他表示，那些不了解伊朗文明的人无法理解其深度，即使基础设施成为目标。他补充说，当伊朗人的民族自豪感受到伤害时，他们会走上街头保卫国家，即使是那些对体制有不满的人，在面对外部威胁时也会表现出激烈的防御。@wfwitness
